name: Test
description:
Not for use, it is here to test how jannyai scrape bot

This bot was published as proxy disabled bot. and it was scraped to JannyAI the day this got uploaded. https://jannyai.com/characters/2fb90740-dbac-47fb-90dc-89804f800176_character-test

Then proxy is set to allowed after it was scraped. and JannyAI hasn't updated the scraped definition. so it still stuck as proxy disabled bot there (no definition leak)

This mean, you can protect your bot from getting mass scraped by published bot as proxy disabled. and allowed proxy afterward to let more people use your bot
creator: Hibikiass
